---
title: "1a: Genome Filtering Report"
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the genome filtering step of the pyphylon pipeline.
Genomes are queried from the BV-BRC API, filtered by species, and then
quality-filtered using N50, contig count, and CheckM metrics.

## Filtration Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("../output/data/1a_df_filtration.csv", index_col=0)
df
```

```{python}
summary = pd.read_csv("../temp/1a_genome_summary.csv", index_col=0)
print(f"Genomes after filtering: {summary.shape[0]}")
```

## Unfiltered Strain Distribution

![](../output/figures/1a_unfiltered_strains.png){width=80%}

## Unfiltered N50 Distribution

![](../output/figures/1a_unfiltered_n50.png){width=80%}

## Filtered Strain Distribution

![](../output/figures/1a_filtered_strains.png){width=80%}
